---
name: Bug Report
about: Something is broken or not working as expected
title: "fix: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what is broken.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What should happen instead.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happens. Include any error messages from the browser console.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 124 |
| OS | e.g. Windows 11 |
| Screen size | e.g. Mobile / Desktop |
| Page / Route | e.g. `/dashboard/public-profile` |

## Console Errors

```
Paste any browser console errors here
```

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem — recent changes, only happens for certain users, etc.
